title: Reduce navigation spacing and add two new videos to Home page

requirements.text: Update the SiteHeader component (frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx) to reduce the horizontal spacing/gap between navigation links (Home, For Farmers, Contact) so they appear closer together and less spread out, without changing the header structure, logo, link labels, destinations, font sizes, colors, active link highlighting, or hover effects.

quotes: Reduce the width/spacing of the navigation menu (Home, For Farmers, Contact). Make the navigation items closer together and less spread out.

acceptanceCriteria: Navigation links (Home, For Farmers, Contact) have reduced horizontal spacing between them
Links appear visibly closer together compared to current layout
All existing navigation functionality remains unchanged (active highlighting, hover effects, routing)
Header logo, structure, and sticky behavior remain unchanged

requirements.text: Update the HomePage component (frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx) "See MORSHID in Action" videos section to add two new embedded YouTube videos for https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=15sPMyEQtbk and https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lbUlArhso58 alongside the existing videos, and ensure all videos (existing + new) are rendered at the same size and are visually aligned, without changing any other page sections, copy, images, or layout.

quotes: Add these 2 new videos to the existing videos: - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=15sPMyEQtbk - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lbUlArhso58
Make all videos the same size and aligned.

acceptanceCriteria: Two new YouTube videos (15sPMyEQtbk and lbUlArhso58) are embedded in the "See MORSHID in Action" section
All videos in the section (existing + new) have identical dimensions
All videos are visually aligned with consistent spacing
Videos are responsive and maintain alignment on different screen sizes
Section title and any surrounding content remain unchanged
No other page sections are modified

constraints: Do not change anything else on the site beyond navigation spacing and video additions
Do not modify header structure, logo, link labels, destinations, font sizes, colors, or hover effects
Do not change any other HomePage sections beyond the videos section
Maintain all existing video functionality and embed behavior
nonGoals: Updating any page copy or images
